metadata.religion_source: Pew Research Center Global Religious Composition 2020
metadata.disclaimer: Religion percentages are estimates. Demographics are approximate. Source: Pew Research Center 2020, World Bank 2024.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Roman Catholic
religion.expat_worship: Catholic churches everywhere. Protestant and international English-language services in Lisbon and Porto.
religion.expat_worship_why: If faith community matters to you, Portugal is easy to navigate because Catholic institutions are everywhere and international services exist in major hubs. Outside Lisbon and Porto, your options narrow and are more local-language first.

demographics.expat_population: Large — estimated 80,000+ Americans and growing
demographics.common_languages: Portuguese; English widely spoken in cities and tourist areas
demographics.expat_population_why: The expat base is already large enough that you can get practical relocation guidance quickly. That popularity also means more competition in the same neighborhoods and services.
demographics.common_languages_why: English usage in major expat areas lowers your startup friction a lot. Portuguese still matters for deeper integration and smoother admin life.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Roman Catholic, increasingly secular
religion.expat_worship: Catholic churches everywhere. International English churches in major cities and expat areas.
religion.expat_worship_why: You can usually find both traditional Catholic and international worship options in big expat cities. In smaller towns, options are less diverse and usually Spanish-led.

demographics.expat_population: Very large — over 300,000 Americans and major British expat community
demographics.common_languages: Spanish; English in tourist areas and cities; Catalan in Barcelona
demographics.expat_population_why: Spain's large foreign resident base makes it easier to build a social circle fast. In high-demand expat zones, popularity can push costs and crowding.
demographics.common_languages_why: English works in many tourist and expat districts, but bureaucracy still runs in Spanish. Functional Spanish gives you much better control over daily decisions.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Roman Catholic
religion.expat_worship: Catholic churches everywhere. English-language Mass available in major cities. Protestant services in larger cities.
religion.expat_worship_why: Catholic infrastructure is abundant, and larger cities offer international congregations. In smaller towns, options are typically local-language and less varied.

demographics.expat_population: Large — major American expat presence in Florence, Rome, Milan
demographics.common_languages: Italian; English in tourist areas; limited outside cities
demographics.expat_population_why: Italy's established expat nodes make initial settlement easier in the right cities. Outside those nodes, support networks can feel sparse.
demographics.common_languages_why: English is useful in tourism-heavy areas but limited for many practical tasks. Basic Italian often determines how smooth your first year feels.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Greek Orthodox
religion.expat_worship: Greek Orthodox churches everywhere. Catholic and Protestant churches in Athens and major tourist islands.
religion.expat_worship_why: Orthodox institutions are deeply present, and major expat centers add more diverse options. On smaller islands, worship choices are often narrower and local.

demographics.expat_population: Growing — significant expat scene in Athens, Crete, and islands
demographics.common_languages: Greek; English widely spoken in tourist areas and among educated population
demographics.expat_population_why: Greece's growing expat population gives you social momentum without feeling overwhelmingly crowded. The community is still uneven by region, so location matters.
demographics.common_languages_why: English helps a lot in tourism-oriented places and early setup. Greek basics still improve everyday confidence and problem-solving.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Roman Catholic, highly secular society
religion.expat_worship: Catholic churches everywhere. American Church in Paris. Protestant and other services in major cities.
religion.expat_worship_why: France gives you broad worship access in major cities, including established international congregations. In rural areas, options can be fewer and more language-dependent.

demographics.expat_population: Very large — major American expat community especially in Paris and south
demographics.common_languages: French; English in Paris and tourist areas; limited in rural areas
demographics.expat_population_why: A large, mature expat presence gives you plenty of practical support if you choose common destinations. In top hubs, the same demand can compress housing options.
demographics.common_languages_why: English can get you started in major cities, especially Paris. French remains essential for durable day-to-day control and administrative confidence.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Roman Catholic
religion.expat_worship: Catholic churches everywhere. Limited non-Catholic options outside Zagreb.
religion.expat_worship_why: Croatia's dominant context is Christianity, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Growing — Dubrovnik and coastal areas popular with expats
demographics.common_languages: Croatian; English very widely spoken especially in tourist areas
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Growing — Dubrovnik and coastal areas popular with expats, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Croatian; English very widely spoken especially in tourist areas. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Mix of Catholic and Protestant (Reformed/Lutheran)
religion.expat_worship: Catholic and Protestant churches available. International English churches in Budapest.
religion.expat_worship_why: Hungary's dominant context is Christianity, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Moderate — Budapest has growing expat scene
demographics.common_languages: Hungarian; English in Budapest; limited outside capital
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Moderate — Budapest has growing expat scene, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Hungarian; English in Budapest; limited outside capital. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: One of the most secular countries in Europe
religion.expat_worship: Catholic and Protestant churches available. International English services in Prague.
religion.expat_worship_why: Czech Republic's dominant context is Unaffiliated, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Large — Prague has very large expat community
demographics.common_languages: Czech; English widely spoken in Prague; limited outside
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Large — Prague has very large expat community, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Czech; English widely spoken in Prague; limited outside. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Roman Catholic, one of Europe's most religious countries
religion.expat_worship: Catholic churches everywhere. International English services in Warsaw and Krakow.
religion.expat_worship_why: Poland's dominant context is Christianity, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Growing — Warsaw and Krakow popular with expats
demographics.common_languages: Polish; English increasingly common especially among younger people
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Growing — Warsaw and Krakow popular with expats, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Polish; English increasingly common especially among younger people. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Romanian Orthodox
religion.expat_worship: Orthodox churches everywhere. Catholic and Protestant services available. Limited English services.
religion.expat_worship_why: Romania's dominant context is Christianity, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Small but growing — Bucharest has emerging expat scene
demographics.common_languages: Romanian; English increasingly spoken in cities especially by younger people
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Small but growing — Bucharest has emerging expat scene, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Romanian; English increasingly spoken in cities especially by younger people. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Bulgarian Orthodox
religion.expat_worship: Orthodox churches everywhere. Limited English-language services.
religion.expat_worship_why: Bulgaria's dominant context is Christianity, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Small — Black Sea coast has British expat community
demographics.common_languages: Bulgarian; English in Sofia and tourist areas
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Small — Black Sea coast has British expat community, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Bulgarian; English in Sofia and tourist areas. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Serbian Orthodox
religion.expat_worship: Orthodox churches everywhere. Growing international community in Belgrade with some English services.
religion.expat_worship_why: Serbia's dominant context is Christianity, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Growing — Belgrade has rapidly growing digital nomad and expat scene
demographics.common_languages: Serbian; English widely spoken in Belgrade especially among younger population
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Growing — Belgrade has rapidly growing digital nomad and expat scene, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Serbian; English widely spoken in Belgrade especially among younger population. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Georgian Orthodox, one of the world's oldest Christian nations
religion.expat_worship: Georgian Orthodox churches everywhere. Growing international community in Tbilisi with some English services.
religion.expat_worship_why: Georgia's dominant context is Christianity, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Large and rapidly growing — major digital nomad destination since 2022
demographics.common_languages: Georgian; Russian (older generation); English growing rapidly especially in Tbilisi
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Large and rapidly growing — major digital nomad destination since 2022, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Georgian; Russian (older generation); English growing rapidly especially in Tbilisi. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Sunni Muslim. Small Christian expat community.
religion.expat_worship: Mosques everywhere. Catholic and Protestant churches available in Casablanca, Rabat, Marrakech for expats.
religion.expat_worship_why: Morocco's dominant context is Islam, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Moderate — Marrakech and Essaouira have established Western expat communities
demographics.common_languages: Arabic; French widely spoken; English limited but growing
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Moderate — Marrakech and Essaouira have established Western expat communities, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Arabic; French widely spoken; English limited but growing. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Sunni Muslim. Small Christian expat community.
religion.expat_worship: Mosques everywhere. Catholic churches available in Tunis and coastal cities for expats.
religion.expat_worship_why: Tunisia's dominant context is Islam, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Small — limited but some European expats in coastal areas
demographics.common_languages: Arabic; French widely spoken; English limited
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Small — limited but some European expats in coastal areas, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Arabic; French widely spoken; English limited. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Sunni Muslim. Significant Coptic Christian minority (~9%).
religion.expat_worship: Mosques everywhere. Coptic, Catholic, and Protestant churches available especially in Cairo.
religion.expat_worship_why: Egypt's dominant context is Islam, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Moderate — Cairo and Red Sea coast have expat communities
demographics.common_languages: Arabic; English in Cairo tourist and business areas; French also spoken
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Moderate — Cairo and Red Sea coast have expat communities, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Arabic; English in Cairo tourist and business areas; French also spoken. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Sunni Muslim. Small historic Christian minority.
religion.expat_worship: Mosques everywhere. Catholic, Protestant, and Orthodox churches in Istanbul and major cities.
religion.expat_worship_why: Turkey's dominant context is Islam, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Large — Istanbul and coastal areas (Bodrum, Antalya) have major expat communities
demographics.common_languages: Turkish; English in tourist areas and Istanbul; limited elsewhere
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Large — Istanbul and coastal areas (Bodrum, Antalya) have major expat communities, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Turkish; English in tourist areas and Istanbul; limited elsewhere. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Roman Catholic with growing Protestant/Evangelical presence
religion.expat_worship: Catholic churches everywhere. English-language Protestant and non-denominational churches in major expat areas.
religion.expat_worship_why: If worship access matters, Mexico is straightforward because Catholic churches are everywhere and English-language options are common in expat hubs. In less expat-heavy cities, service language becomes more Spanish-dependent.

demographics.expat_population: Very large — over 1.5 million Americans live in Mexico
demographics.common_languages: Spanish; English widely spoken in expat areas and tourist zones
demographics.expat_population_why: The huge American expat population means there is a playbook for almost every relocation step. In major enclaves, that same demand can reshape neighborhoods and pricing.
demographics.common_languages_why: You can function in English in many retiree destinations early on. Your independence rises quickly once you can handle daily Spanish interactions.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Roman Catholic with growing Evangelical presence
religion.expat_worship: Catholic churches everywhere. Growing English-language church options in Medellin and Bogota.
religion.expat_worship_why: You will find strong Christian infrastructure and growing expat-oriented congregations in major cities. Outside those centers, English-language worship can be limited.

demographics.expat_population: Large and rapidly growing — Medellin is a top expat destination globally
demographics.common_languages: Spanish; English in expat neighborhoods of Medellin and Bogota
demographics.expat_population_why: Medellin and Bogota now have enough expat depth to support newcomers well. Concentration in a few areas means your city choice has outsized impact.
demographics.common_languages_why: English support exists in specific neighborhoods, but Spanish still drives most daily life. Language investment is one of the fastest ways to reduce friction.

religion.christian_note: Mix of Roman Catholic and Protestant/Evangelical
religion.expat_worship: Catholic churches everywhere. English-language churches in Panama City. Large English-speaking population.
religion.expat_worship_why: You can find familiar Christian options easily, including English-language services in key expat hubs. Outside major centers, religious life is more local-language.

demographics.expat_population: Very large relative to population — top retirement destination
demographics.common_languages: Spanish; English widely spoken in Panama City and expat areas
demographics.expat_population_why: Panama's retiree-focused expat base makes practical onboarding unusually straightforward. Popularity also concentrates demand in a handful of areas.
demographics.common_languages_why: English is widely workable in many expat and business zones. Spanish skills still improve healthcare and everyday independence.

religion.christian_note: Mix of Roman Catholic and Protestant/Evangelical
religion.expat_worship: Catholic churches everywhere. Active English-language church community especially in expat areas.
religion.expat_worship_why: You will find broad Christian worship access and active English-language communities in key retiree regions. In less expat-heavy towns, options are fewer and more local-language.

demographics.expat_population: Very large relative to population — major US retirement destination
demographics.common_languages: Spanish; English in tourist and expat areas; good English-speaking infrastructure
demographics.expat_population_why: Large relative expat density means support networks are strong for newcomers. In top retirement corridors, demand pressure can affect housing and services.
demographics.common_languages_why: English usage in tourism-heavy zones lowers transition stress quickly. Spanish still gives you more control outside those zones.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Roman Catholic
religion.expat_worship: Catholic churches everywhere. English-language church options in Cuenca expat community.
religion.expat_worship_why: Ecuador's dominant context is Christianity, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Large — Cuenca has one of Latin America's largest expat communities per capita
demographics.common_languages: Spanish; English in Cuenca expat areas; limited elsewhere
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Large — Cuenca has one of Latin America's largest expat communities per capita, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Spanish; English in Cuenca expat areas; limited elsewhere. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Mix of Roman Catholic and Protestant
religion.expat_worship: Catholic churches everywhere. English-language services in expat and tourist areas.
religion.expat_worship_why: Dominican Republic's dominant context is Christianity, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Moderate — Santo Domingo and Punta Cana have expat communities
demographics.common_languages: Spanish; English in tourist zones and Santo Domingo
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Moderate — Santo Domingo and Punta Cana have expat communities, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Spanish; English in tourist zones and Santo Domingo. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: One of Latin America's most secular countries. Mix of Catholic and Protestant.
religion.expat_worship: Catholic and Protestant churches available. Small but established expat community with some English services.
religion.expat_worship_why: Uruguay's dominant context is Unaffiliated, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Small but growing — Montevideo increasingly popular with South American expats and some Americans
demographics.common_languages: Spanish; limited English outside tourist areas
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Small but growing — Montevideo increasingly popular with South American expats and some Americans, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Spanish; limited English outside tourist areas. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Roman Catholic with growing Evangelical presence
religion.expat_worship: Catholic churches everywhere. English-language churches in Buenos Aires expat areas.
religion.expat_worship_why: Argentina's dominant context is Christianity, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Large — Buenos Aires has significant American and European expat community
demographics.common_languages: Spanish; English in Buenos Aires expat areas; Italian cultural influence
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Large — Buenos Aires has significant American and European expat community, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Spanish; English in Buenos Aires expat areas; Italian cultural influence. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Mix of Roman Catholic and rapidly growing Evangelical/Pentecostal
religion.expat_worship: Catholic and Evangelical churches everywhere. English-language services in major cities.
religion.expat_worship_why: Brazil's dominant context is Christianity, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Moderate — Sao Paulo and Florianopolis have expat communities
demographics.common_languages: Portuguese; English limited outside major business areas
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Moderate — Sao Paulo and Florianopolis have expat communities, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Portuguese; English limited outside major business areas. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Roman Catholic
religion.expat_worship: Catholic churches everywhere. English-language services in Lima expat areas.
religion.expat_worship_why: Peru's dominant context is Christianity, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Small but growing — Lima and Cusco have expat communities
demographics.common_languages: Spanish; English in Lima tourist areas and Cusco
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Small but growing — Lima and Cusco have expat communities, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Spanish; English in Lima tourist areas and Cusco. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Mix of Roman Catholic and growing Evangelical/Pentecostal
religion.expat_worship: Catholic churches everywhere. English-language services in Santiago expat areas.
religion.expat_worship_why: Chile's dominant context is Christianity, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Small — Santiago has professional expat community
demographics.common_languages: Spanish; English in business areas of Santiago
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Small — Santiago has professional expat community, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Spanish; English in business areas of Santiago. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Theravada Buddhist. Small Muslim minority in south.
religion.expat_worship: Buddhist temples everywhere. Churches in Bangkok and Chiang Mai. International English-language services available.
religion.expat_worship_why: You can keep religious continuity through international churches in major expat hubs while living in a predominantly Buddhist culture. Outside those hubs, options can thin out quickly.

demographics.expat_population: Very large — estimated 60,000+ Americans; massive international expat community
demographics.common_languages: Thai; English in tourist areas, Bangkok, and Chiang Mai expat zones
demographics.expat_population_why: Large expat numbers mean you can find peer communities at many budget levels. Fast-moving expat neighborhoods can feel transient instead of rooted.
demographics.common_languages_why: English works in core tourism and expat zones, so transition is manageable. For long-term ease, basic Thai helps with healthcare and local services.

religion.christian_note: Officially Islamic but constitutionally protects freedom of religion. Diverse religious landscape.
religion.expat_worship: Mosques, Buddhist temples, churches, and Hindu temples all present. English-language churches widely available.
religion.expat_worship_why: Malaysia's multi-faith landscape gives you broad worship choice in major urban centers. Local legal and cultural norms still matter, so context awareness is important.

demographics.expat_population: Very large — major expat destination; English is widely spoken
demographics.common_languages: Malay, English (widely spoken), Mandarin, Tamil — very multilingual country
demographics.expat_population_why: Large foreign-resident communities create practical support and social depth for retirees. Community distribution is uneven, so city selection is everything.
demographics.common_languages_why: Widespread English usage makes first-year adaptation much easier. Learning local language basics still helps in non-expat daily interactions.

religion.christian_note: Mix of folk religion, Buddhism, and Christianity. Relatively secular in practice.
religion.expat_worship: Buddhist pagodas everywhere. Catholic churches common. English-language services in Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City.
religion.expat_worship_why: You can access a mix of worship options in major cities, including English-friendly congregations. Outside those cities, options can be more limited and locally oriented.

demographics.expat_population: Large and growing — Da Nang and Hoi An popular with Western expats
demographics.common_languages: Vietnamese; English growing especially in expat areas and among younger people
demographics.expat_population_why: Vietnam's expat communities are large enough to offer real support in key hubs. The network is still concentrated, so city choice drives your experience.
demographics.common_languages_why: English is improving in expat-facing neighborhoods and among younger residents. Practical Vietnamese still helps significantly for long-term comfort.

religion.christian_note: Predominantly Roman Catholic (80%). Most Christian country in Asia.
religion.expat_worship: Catholic churches everywhere. Wide variety of Protestant denominations. Very familiar Christian culture for Americans.
religion.expat_worship_why: You can keep familiar Christian worship practices very easily because church infrastructure is extensive and culturally central. Regional quality and style still vary by city.

demographics.expat_population: Very large — major American expat community; English is official language
demographics.common_languages: English and Filipino both official; English universally spoken
demographics.expat_population_why: The large American-linked expat base makes social and practical onboarding easier than in many Asian markets. Concentration in a few cities means local conditions can differ sharply.
demographics.common_languages_why: High English usage is a major transition advantage and reduces daily friction. Local language awareness still helps outside metro expat bubbles.

religion.christian_note: World's largest Muslim country. Significant Christian minority especially in Bali (Hindu) and eastern islands.
religion.expat_worship: Bali is predominantly Hindu — unique in Indonesia. Churches in Christian areas. Mosques everywhere.
religion.expat_worship_why: Indonesia's dominant context is Islam, so you can usually find a path that fits your worship style with some local research. English-language options are typically strongest in larger cities.

demographics.expat_population: Large in Bali — massive international expat and digital nomad community
demographics.common_languages: Indonesian; English in Bali tourist areas; limited elsewhere
demographics.expat_population_why: Current data points to Large in Bali — massive international expat and digital nomad community, which helps you judge how much peer support you can expect when you arrive. Larger hubs usually provide smoother landing support than secondary cities.
demographics.common_languages_why: Daily communication is shaped by Indonesian; English in Bali tourist areas; limited elsewhere. Even if you can start in English, basic local language skills usually improve your long-term quality of life.

religion.christian_note: Most Japanese practice both Shinto and Buddhist traditions without strong religious identity. Very few Christians.
religion.expat_worship: Buddhist temples and Shinto shrines everywhere. Churches in major cities. International English services in Tokyo and Osaka.
religion.expat_worship_why: Major Japanese cities offer international congregations even though the broader culture is not institutionally religion-forward. Outside metro centers, your options can narrow quickly.

demographics.expat_population: Moderate — Tokyo has large expat community; limited outside major cities
demographics.common_languages: Japanese; English in tourist areas; limited elsewhere; signage often in English
demographics.expat_population_why: The expat base in top cities is substantial enough for community support, but integration still takes effort. Outside major hubs, social onboarding can be slower.
demographics.common_languages_why: English helps in selected urban contexts but is not enough for full daily independence. Basic Japanese is one of the best investments you can make.

religion.christian_note: Surprisingly large Christian population. Mix of Protestant and Catholic.
religion.expat_worship: Many churches including large English-language congregations in Seoul. Buddhist temples widely available.
